executionArgs.additionalInstruction: CeialMilk API: login response JSON MUST use body['data']['access_token'] and body['data']['refresh_token'] — NEVER root access_token or access. Seed admin: admin@ceialmilk.com password "password". Register: nome+email+password. POST animais: fazenda_id, identificacao, data_nascimento. POST producao: animal_id, quantidade.
